purpose: Publish the scored evidence used to retire the original Timeless general wrapper.

supports: Recomputing the preference counts, mean rubric scores, and unnecessary-process flags
Inspecting every published case, anonymous output, score, preference reason, and grader note
does_not_support: Independent proof of model identity, prompt delivery, grader independence, execution time, token cost, or pre-registration
A claim that the narrower Timeless Governor outperforms a strong native baseline
Generalization beyond the four tasks and tested wrapper represented by these artifacts

publication_transformations: Excluded the source meta directory because it contained local paths and is not required for aggregation.
Published private-mapping.md as mapping.md after grading was complete.
Changed absolute temporary paths in the three grader manifests to bundle-relative paths. Pair orders were not changed.
Generated README.md, manifest.json, and SHA256SUMS for the public bundle.
